ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Nov-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Continued To Apr-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Continued To Mar-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lindsay Albert in Propria Persona.
Leslie Ramirez also present.

The Court encouraged Mr. Albert to get an Attorney, stated that this is very detailed, that there are still some problems with the inventory, that it needs to be amended and that the inventory needs to list the Decedent's bank accounts as of the date of death. Mr. Albert stated that it was a joint account, that he believes he was not required to report it, that he opened an estate account and that there was no single account in the Decedent's name. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to March 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lindsay Albert (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Leslie Ramirez also present.

Mr. Albert stated that he was not here on September 5th because he received an e-mail from the Probate Examiner stating that he did not fill out the paper work properly and that the hearing was being continued to September 19th (copy of e-mail presented in open Court). Mr. Albert also stated that he went to the Clerk's office, that the Clerk told him that the hearing was continued to October 3rd, and that he filed a supplemental declaration. The Court informed Mr. Albert that if the petition is granted it will be with limited authority, that there are statutory notice requirements, that he will be required to marshal assets, file an inventory, pay creditors and do final distribution when the estate is ready to be closed. The Court also informed Mr. Albert that he can not co-mingle assets, distribute anything without a court order or pay any legal fees. Mr. Albert stated that his Sister is an Attorney, that she is helping him, and that the only assets are the house and a car that is worth about $5,000.00. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to the order being reviewed and revised). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for October 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Albert that if any other assets are discovered, he is to file a bond for the value of those assets. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on October 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.
